name: dev-tools-plugin
description: Developer workflow plugin for git, dead-code analysis, dependency updates, spec sync, and documentation maintenance tasks.

interface.longDescription: Adds Codex skills and specialist agents for pull requests, dead-code analysis, dependency updates, spec synchronization, and documentation updates.
defaultPrompt: Review this repo for dead code and explain the safe removals.
Update dependencies in this project and note any breaking changes.
Update the project docs to match the current implementation.
